case_title: MEHRNOUSH BARMAKI VS. DEAN DUNCAN et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DEAN DUNCAN, M.D.'S NOTICE OF PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING PLAINTIFF TO ARBITRATE CONTROVERSY AND MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS; REQUEST FOR COSTS AND FEES. Notice Of Petition For Order Compelling Pltf. To Arbitrate Controversesy And Motion To Stay Proceedings;Request For Costs And Fees
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DEAN DUNCAN, M.D.'S Notice Of Petition For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Arbitrate Controversy And Motion To Stay Proceedings; Request For Costs And Fees.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT STAY AND COMPELLING ARBITRATION. DENY FEES AND COSTS. SEE HILLEARY V. GARVIN. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ/KD) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Peppina Thompson, CSR #7433
